tools.name: -health-check
tools.description: Internal health check tool. Verifies connectivity to backend.

tools.name: list-agents
tools.description: List agents owned by the user or in their workspaces.

workspaceId.description: Optional: Filter agents by workspace ID. If not provided, lists all accessible agents.

tools.name: get-agent
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific agent.

tools.name: create-agent
tools.description: Create a new agent instance from an agent core.

coreId.description: The agent core ID to use (e.g., 'alice', 'iria')

fullName.description: Full name for the agent (e.g., 'Alice Evergreen')

workspaceId.description: Optional: Workspace ID to create the agent in. If not provided, creates a global agent.

tools.name: update-agent
tools.description: Update an existing agent's properties.

avatarUrl.description: URL of the agent avatar image

context.description: Agent-specific context that gets injected into the system prompt. Use this to provide agent-specific instructions, guidelines, or knowledge. Supports markdown.

tools.name: delete-agent
tools.description: Delete an agent. This also removes all app access grants for the agent.

tools.name: list-agent-cores
tools.description: List all available agent cores (base personalities/engines).

tools.name: list-agent-apps
tools.description: List all apps an agent has access to.

tools.name: get-agent-providers
tools.description: Get the LLM provider configuration for an agent. Returns the agent's available providers, preferred provider, and selected model.

tools.name: set-agent-providers
tools.description: Set the available LLM providers for an agent. This determines which providers the agent can use. Requires workspace access or agent ownership.

providerIds.description: Array of provider IDs to make available to this agent

tools.name: set-agent-preferred-provider
tools.description: Set the preferred LLM provider for an agent. The provider must be in the agent's available providers list. Pass null to clear the preference.

providerId.description: Provider ID to set as preferred (must be in availableProviders), or null to clear

tools.name: list-workspaces
tools.description: List workspaces the user owns or is a member of.

tools.name: get-workspace
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific workspace.

tools.name: create-workspace
tools.description: Create a new workspace with its own volume.

tools.name: update-workspace
tools.description: Update workspace properties including the context that gets injected into agent system prompts.

context.description: Context text that gets injected into agent system prompts. Use this to provide project-specific information, guidelines, coding standards, or any other context that agents should know. Supports markdown and can be long (multiple paragraphs).

tools.name: archive-workspace
tools.description: Archive a workspace (soft delete). Only the owner can archive.

tools.name: add-workspace-member
tools.description: Add a member to a workspace.

tools.name: remove-workspace-member
tools.description: Remove a member from a workspace.

tools.name: update-workspace-member-role
tools.description: Update a member's role in a workspace.

tools.name: list-apps
tools.description: List apps owned by the user.

tools.name: get-app
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific app.

tools.name: install-app
tools.description: Install an MCA from the catalog as an app.

name.description: Optional: Custom name for the app. Auto-generated if not provided.

workspaceId.description: Optional: Install in a workspace. If not provided, installs as a user app.

tools.name: uninstall-app
tools.description: Uninstall an app. This also removes all agent access grants.

tools.name: rename-app
tools.description: Rename an installed app.

tools.name: list-app-access
tools.description: List all agents that have access to an app.

tools.name: workspace-app-list
tools.description: List apps in a workspace.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID to list apps for

tools.name: workspace-agent-list
tools.description: List agents in a workspace.

workspaceId.description: The workspace ID to list agents for

tools.name: list-catalog
tools.description: List all MCAs available in the catalog.

tools.name: list-providers
tools.description: List all LLM providers available to the user. Returns providers with their models, status, and configuration.

tools.name: grant-app-access
tools.description: Grant an agent access to an app.

agentId.description: The agent to grant access to

appId.description: The app to grant access to

tools.name: revoke-app-access
tools.description: Revoke an agent's access to an app.

agentId.description: The agent to revoke access from

appId.description: The app to revoke access to
